tasks.subject: Task 1: Migration 0002 + RankGroupTurn query + sqlc generate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the picks table and the least-served ranking query, regenerate sqlc.

**Files:**
- Create: backend/migrations/0002_picks.sql
- Create: backend/internal/db/query/turn.sql
- Modify (generated): backend/internal/db/models.go, backend/internal/db/turn.sql.go

**Verify:** cd backend && just sqlc && just build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/migrations/0002_picks.sql", "backend/internal/db/query/turn.sql", "backend/internal/db/turn.sql.go", "backend/internal/db/models.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just sqlc && just build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["just sqlc clean", "RankGroupTurnRow has ServedCount int32 + LastPickedOn pgtype.Date", "just build compiles"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Turn handler with pure-function unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add turn.go (turnResponse, parsePresent, toTurnResponses, turnStore, turnHandler), wire route in main.go, unit-test pure functions (no mocks).

**Files:**
- Create: backend/turn.go
- Create: backend/turn_test.go
- Modify: backend/main.go

**Verify:** cd backend && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/turn.go", "backend/turn_test.go", "backend/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parsePresent unit tests pass", "toTurnResponses unit tests pass", "route registered", "just check exit 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Turn ranking integration test (testcontainers)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify the full ranking path against real Postgres; assert order, present filter, is_credited filter, empty + 400 cases.

**Files:**
- Create: backend/turn_integration_test.go

**Verify:** cd backend && go test -tags=integration -run 'TestTurnHandlerIntegration' ./... -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/turn_integration_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test -tags=integration -run 'TestTurnHandlerIntegration' ./... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["default ranking order correct", "present subset filters", "empty present-set returns []", "malformed present returns 400"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Dev seed pick history
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append idempotent pick history to seed.sql for an unambiguous ranking.

**Files:**
- Modify: backend/seed.sql

**Verify:** cd backend && just db-up && just migrate && just seed && just seed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/seed.sql"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just db-up && just migrate && just seed && just seed", "acceptanceCriteria": ["idempotent re-seed", "curl /turn returns Ada first"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Mobile turn data layer (fetch + validation + tests)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add lib/turn.ts (TurnMember, parseTurn, fetchTurn) mirroring members.ts, with unit + real-server integration tests.

**Files:**
- Create: mobile/lib/turn.ts
- Create: mobile/lib/turn.test.ts
- Create: mobile/lib/turn.integration.test.ts

**Verify:** cd mobile && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/turn.ts", "mobile/lib/turn.test.ts", "mobile/lib/turn.integration.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parseTurn validation tests pass", "fetchTurn integration tests pass", "just check exit 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Mobile screen — render ranking, highlight picker
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Switch App.tsx to fetchTurn; render ranked list with element 0 badged 'Tonight's pick'.

**Files:**
- Modify: mobile/App.tsx

**Verify:** cd mobile && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/App.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["renders /turn ranking", "picker badge + highlight on element 0", "just check exit 0"]}
```
